description:
Operating Area: Italy, Sardinia, Corsica, Sicily, Amalfi Coast

THYKE III is a 27.50m / 90ft Luxury Motor Yacht built in 2008 by Pershing and later underwent a refit in 2024. Sleeping 9 guests in 4 cabins and with a crew of 4. Cruising at 31.00 kn/ph with a top speed of 42.00 kn/ph. The guest cabins comprise a Master cabin with en-suite bathroom facilities, a VIP cabin with en-suite bathroom facilities, a twin cabin with pullman bed and en-suite bathroom facilities, and a double cabin.

crew.name: Giuseppe La Delfa
crew.bio:
Nationality: Italian
Languages: Italian, English

Born in Italy has spent all is youth and current career following his passion for the sea. After graduating from the Institute Nautical he immediately started his duties as cadet on board both commercial and cruising boats. 

Captain La Delfa has been working in the yachting industry for over 10 years. He has extensively cruised both the Western & Mediterranean as well as Indian, Pacific and Atlantic Ocean. 
His friendly attitude and his deep knowledge of the sea and commercial operations makes him one of the youngest still most expert Captain in the industry.

Qualifications: 
OOW II/1, Fire Fighting Basic, Fire Fighting Advanced, BRM Leadership & Team work, Medical First AidRadar Observation and plotting, ARPA, GMDSS (G.O.C.), ECDIS, SECURITY DUTIES, PSSR MAMS, PERS.SURV.TEC

crew.name: Antonio Valente
crew.bio:
Nationality: Italian
Languages: Italian, English

Francesco brings to the deck team a rare combination of technical knowledge, seafaring experience, and a calm, solution-oriented mindset. With a solid foundation in both commercial and private maritime operations, he is well-versed in safety protocols, navigation systems, and deck procedures, making him a dependable presence in all conditions. He is meticulous in maintaining the exterior of the vessel, skilled in tender operations, and always ready to assist with guest activities, ensuring a seamless experience on board. His ability to anticipate needs, communicate effectively with crew and guests alike, and remain composed under pressure makes him a valuable asset to any yacht aiming for operational excellence.

Francesco also brings a strong sense of discipline and teamwork, with a proactive attitude that aligns perfectly with the high standards of Thyke III. His dedication to constant improvement, coupled with his warm professionalism, ensures he contributes positively not only to the functionality of the yacht, but to the overall atmosphere on board.

crew.name: Giuliano Zarantonello
crew.bio:
Nationality: Italian
Languages: Italian, English

Giuliano is a seasoned and passionate Italian chef with over two decades of experience in high-end hospitality, fine dining, and culinary navigation. His extensive background in both Italian and French cuisine, combined with a profound respect for seasonal, high-quality ingredients, makes him an exceptional culinary presence aboard Thyke III. For the past eleven years, Giuliano has served as both chef and sailor for international guests aboard luxury river barges across Italy and France. Responsible for designing full menus and selecting raw ingredients, he consistently delivered authentic regional cuisine with creativity, precision, and elegance. Beyond the galley, Giuliano is a true team player, known for his calm demeanor, professionalism, and excellent organizational skills. Clean, detail oriented, and highly adaptable, he brings a collaborative spirit and a problem-solving mindset to every environment. A passionate sailor with a nautical license and Atlantic crossing experience, Giuliano embodies the spirit of the sea both in and out of the kitchen. His dedication to guest satisfaction, his versatility, and his warm, respectful personality make him an invaluable asset to the Thyke III crew, elevating the onboard experience through every dish he creates.

crew.name: Ángela Navas
crew.bio:
Nationality: Italian -  Colombian
Languages: Italian, English, Spanish

Ángela is a passionate and versatile stewardess with over a decade of experience in hospitality and one year aboard a 52m private motor yacht in the role of Chief Stewardess. She brings a refined sense of service, an eye for detail, and a warm, guest-focused approach to life on board. With a strong background as a professional mixologist and barista, she adds a unique flair to onboard service, creating elevated and personalized guest experiences.
On THYKE III, Ángela stands out for her ability to anticipate guests' needs, her excellent communication skills, and her genuine enthusiasm for hospitality. She is well-versed in provisioning, service, laundry care, and event organisation, while also contributing to the crew’s wellbeing as a supportive team player. Ángela holds all relevant STCW and medical certifications and combines technical competence with a kind, respectful demeanor.
Her creativity, multilingual skills, and international mindset make her an exceptional asset onboard THYKE III.
